title: Violation
description: Represents a single rule violation detected by the WatchLLM Kernel.  Shared across Python kernel, Rust runtime, and Wasm consumers.

rule.description: Alias for rule_id used by the Rust runtime (e.g. 'secrets', 'imports', 'boundaries', 'auth_flow'). At least one of rule_id or rule must be present.

severity.description: Severity level.  Python kernel uses the canonical enum (CRITICAL | HIGH | MEDIUM | LOW | INFO); the Rust runtime uses lower-case short forms (error | warning | info).  Consumers must accept both.

line.description: 1‑based line number.  Used by the Rust runtime flat structure; mutually exclusive with location.line.

column.description: 1‑based column number.  Used by the Rust runtime flat structure; mutually exclusive with location.column.

location.description: Structured source location span (Python kernel).  May be null when the location is not available.

evidence.description: Optional snippet of the source code that triggered the violation.
